debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S D : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
a b : α
hb : b ≤ a
hb' : b ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})
I : Set α
hI : I ∈ R
hI' : a ∈ I
⊢ b ≤ ⊥

failed_attempts:
have ha' : a ∈ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) := by
    refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
    exact ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hI, hI'⟩⟩
  have hb'' : b ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by simpa using hb'
  have hsup : sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) ≤ sSup I := by
    refine sSup_le ?_
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ∈ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) := (Set.mem_diff.1 hx).1
    simp [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx'
    rcases hx' with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
    by_cases hJI : J = I
    · subst hJI
      exact le_csSup (by
        classical
        refine ⟨a, ?_, ?_⟩
        · exact hI'
        · exact hb) hxJ
    · have : x ≤ ⊥ := by
        have hInd : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
        have hxI : x ∈ I := by
          -- impossible unless J = I, so use indep to force bottom
          -- we only need a bound; use `le_bot_iff` via contradiction in lattice?
          -- Instead, use `by_contra` to derive J=I from uniqueness? not available.
          -- Fall back: since we only need `x ≤ sSup I`, use `le_top`.
          sorry
      exact le_trans this bot_le
  have hIndI : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbI : b ≤ sSup I := le_trans hb'' hsup
  have hbI' : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb'' ?_
    refine sSup_le ?_
    intro x hx
    exact le_csSup (by
      classical
      refine ⟨x, ?_, le_rfl⟩
      exact (Set.mem_diff.1 hx).1) ((Set.mem_diff.1 hx).1)
  have : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    classical
    have hDisj : Disjoint a (sSup (I \ {a})) := by
      refine disjoint_left.2 ?_
      intro x hxA hxS
      have : x ≤ a := hxA
      have hxMem : x ∈ I := hI'
      have : x ∈ ({a} : Set α) := by
        simp [Set.mem_singleton_iff, le_antisymm (le_trans this hb) (le_trans hb this)]
      have : x ∈ I \ {a} := ⟨hxMem, by simpa using this⟩
      exact (Set.mem_diff.1 this).2 (by simp [Set.mem_singleton_iff])
    have hbot : a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
      simpa [disjoint_iff] using hDisj
    have hsup' : a ⊔ sSup (I \ {a}) = sSup I := by
      -- standard: `I = {a} ∪ (I \ {a})`
      have hUnion : ({a} : Set α) ∪ (I \ {a}) = I := by
        ext x; constructor
        · intro hx
          rcases hx with hx | hx
          · simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hx ▸ hI'
          · exact (Set.mem_diff.1 hx).1
        · intro hx
          by_cases hxa : x = a
          · left; simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff, hxa]
          · right
            refine ⟨hx, ?_⟩
            simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff, hxa]
      -- use `sSup_union` and `sSup_singleton`
      simpa [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.sSup_union, hUnion, Set.sSup_singleton] using
        (by
          -- `sSup ({a} ∪ (I \ {a})) = sSup {a} ⊔ sSup (I \ {a})`
          rfl)
    -- now use indep on `I` with `a ∈ I` and `b ≤ sSup (I \ {a})` and `b ≤ a`
    have hb0 : b ≤ ⊥ := by
      have hInd : sSupIndep I := hIndI
      -- apply to `a` and `b` with `b ≤ sSup (I \ {a})`
      -- use `hb : b ≤ a` and `hbI'`
      have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_inf hb hbI'
      simpa [hbot] using this
    exact hb0
  exact this

have ha_mem : a ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
    refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
    exact ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hI, hI'⟩⟩
  have hb_le_a : b ≤ a := hb
  have hb_le_compl : b ≤ sSup ((decomposition_of_refinement R) \ {a}) := by
    simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using hb'
  have hb_le : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup ((decomposition_of_refinement R) \ {a}) :=
    le_inf hb_le_a hb_le_compl
  have : a ⊓ sSup ((decomposition_of_refinement R) \ {a}) = ⊥ :=
    (R.carrier_indep I hI).disjoint_sSup (by
          intro x hx
          have : x ≠ a := by
            intro hxa
            have : x ∈ ({a} : Set α) := by simpa [hxa]
            exact hx.2 this
          have hxI : x ∈ I := hx.1
          exact this (by simpa using hxI))
  exact le_trans hb_le (by simpa [this])

have ha' : a ∈ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) := by
    refine Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ?_
    exact ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩
  have hab : a ∉ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} := by

  have hsup : disjoint a (sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})) := by

  exact (hsup.le_bot_iff.mp ⟨hb, hb'⟩)

have ha_mem : a ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
    refine Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ?_
    exact ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ⟨hI, hI'⟩⟩
  have hInd : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    have : sSup (I \ {a}) ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
      refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
      intro x hx
      have hxI : x ∈ I := hx.1
      refine ⟨?_, hx.2⟩
      refine Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ?_
      exact ⟨I, ⟨hI, hxI⟩⟩
    exact le_trans hb' this
  have hb_bot : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    have hab : b ≤ a := hb
    have hb_ne : b ∈ I \ {a} → False := by
      intro hbmem
      exact hbmem.2 (le_antisymm hab (le_trans (le_csSup (by
        classical
        exact ⟨a, hbmem.1, rfl⟩)) le_rfl))
    have : sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
      classical
      apply eq_bot_iff.2
      intro x hx
      exfalso
      exact hb_ne ⟨hx, by
        intro hxa
        exact (Set.not_mem_singleton x).2 (by simpa [hxa])⟩
    simpa [this] using hbI
  exact hb_bot

have ha' : a ∈ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) := by
    refine Set.mem_iUnion₂.mpr ?_
    exact ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩
  have hb'' : b ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) ⊓ a := by
    exact le_inf hb' hb
  have : sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) ⊓ a = ⊥ := by
    simpa [Set.sep_def] using (R.carrier_indep I hI).disjoint_sSup (s := I \ {a})

  simpa [this] using hb''

have hsup : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    have : (I \ {a} : Set α) ⊆ ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
      intro x hx
      refine ⟨?_, hx.2⟩
      exact ⟨I, hI, hx.1⟩
    exact le_trans hb' (sSup_le_sSup this)
  have hba : b ≤ a := hb
  have hb_bot : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    have : Disjoint a (sSup (I \ {a})) := by

    exact this.le_bot (le_inf hba hbI)

have hb'' : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' (sSup_le ?_)
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨J, hJ, xJ⟩
    by_cases hJI : J = I
    · subst hJI
      exact le_sSup_of_le x (le_sSup_of_le hx.2 (le_rfl))
    · have : x ≤ ⊥ := by
        have hInd : sSupIndep (⋃ D ∈ R, D) := by
          intro a ha b hb hne
          rcases ha with ⟨Ia, hIa, haIa⟩
          rcases hb with ⟨Ib, hIb, hbIb⟩
          by_cases h : Ia = Ib
          · subst h
            have := R.carrier_indep Ia hIa
            exact this _ haIa _ hbIb hne
          · have := (R.carrier_indep Ia hIa) _ haIa _ (by
              have : b ∈ Ia := by
                -- impossible; use independence at the big union instead
                exact False.elim (h (by rfl)))
            exact False.elim (h rfl)
        exact le_trans (le_of_eq (by simpa using xJ)) bot_le
      exact le_trans this (le_sSup_of_le x (le_sSup_of_le hx.2 (le_rfl)))
  have hIndI : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have : Disjoint a (sSup (I \ {a})) := by
    simpa [sSupIndep] using hIndI a hI' (sSup (I \ {a})) (by
      refine le_sSup ?_
      intro x hx
      exact le_sSup_of_le x (le_sSup_of_le hx.2 (le_rfl))) (by
      intro h
      have : a ∈ I \ {a} := by
        refine ⟨hI', ?_⟩
        simpa using h
      exact this.2 rfl)
  have : a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
    simpa [disjoint_iff] using this
  have hb0 : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_inf hb hb''
  exact le_trans hb0 (by simpa [this])

have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' ?_
    refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
    have hJa : a ∈ J := by
      have : a ∈ ⋃ D ∈ R, D := by
        refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hI, hI'⟩⟩
      have ha' : a ∉ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} := by
        intro h
        exact h.2 (by simp)
      have : x ∈ ⋃ D ∈ R, D := Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨J, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hJ, hxJ⟩⟩
      have hxne : x ∉ {a} := by
        intro hxA
        have : x = a := by simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hxA
        subst this
        exact ha' ⟨this, by simp⟩
      have : a ∈ J := by
        by_contra haJ
        have hxsub : x ∈ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} := by
          refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
          · exact Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨J, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hJ, hxJ⟩⟩
          · exact hxne
        exact ha' (by
          have : a ∈ {a} := by simp
          exact ⟨Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hI, hI'⟩⟩, by simp⟩)
      exact this
    have : J = I := by
      have hspan := R.carrier_span a ?_ 
      · rcases hspan with ⟨D, hD, huniq⟩
        have hJI : a = sSup J := by
          have : a ∈ J := hJa
          have hbot : ⊥ ∉ J := R.bot_not_mem J hJ
          -- use uniqueness: both J and I are in carrier and have a = sSup _
          have h1 : J ∈ R := hJ
          have h2 : I ∈ R := hI
          have hJ' : a = sSup J := by
            -- since a ∈ J and J is independent and doesn't contain ⊥, we have a ≤ sSup J and sSup J ≤ a via hb?
            -- but easiest: take definition via equality is not available; instead use uniqueness with witnesses I and J
            sorry
        exact (huniq J hJ hJI).trans (huniq I hI (by
          have : a ∈ I := hI'
          sorry)).symm
      · sorry
    -- fallback: since the above is messy, just give a weaker bound to sSup I
    refine le_trans ?_ (le_trans (le_sSup_of_le a ?_) (by simpa using le_rfl))
    · exact le_of_eq (by simp)
    · exact Set.mem_diff.2 ⟨hI', by simp⟩
  have hInd : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hb0 : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
      refine le_inf hb hbI
    have hdisj : a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
      simpa [sSup_insert, sup_assoc, sup_comm, sup_left_comm] using
        (hInd a hI' (sSup (I \ {a})) (by
          -- membership of sSup ... in I is not needed; use indep property on set elements not sup
          sorry) (by
          -- show b ≤ sSup (...) already
          sorry))
    exact le_trans this (by simpa [hdisj])
  exact hb0

have habot : a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
    simpa [sSupIndep, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] using
      (R.carrier_indep I hI) a hI' (sSup (I \ {a}))
        (by
          refine le_csSup ?_ ?_
          · exact ⟨a, by simpa [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff, hI']⟩
          · exact hb')
        (by
          have : a ∉ I \ {a} := by
            simp [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
          simpa [this] )
  have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
    exact le_inf hb hb'
  exact le_trans this (by simpa [habot])

have hIa : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' ?_
    refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxna⟩
    rcases hxU with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
    have hJ' : J = I := by
      have haS : a ∈ S := by
        sorry
      have huniq := R.carrier_span a haS
      rcases huniq with ⟨D, hD, haD, huniqD⟩
      have haI : a = sSup I := by
        exact (huniqD I hI rfl).1
      have haJ : a = sSup J := by
        exact (huniqD J hJ rfl).1
      exact by
        have := (huniqD I hI haI).2
        exact (this J hJ haJ).symm
    subst hJ'
    exact hxJ
  have hb0 : b ≤ ⨅ x ∈ (I \ {a}), x := by
    refine hIa.le_iInf ?_ hb ?_ ?_
    · exact hI'
    · exact hbI
  simpa using le_trans hb0 (by simpa using (iInf₂_le (a := a) (b := by simp [hI']) : (⨅ x ∈ (I \ {a}), x) ≤ ⊥))

by_cases ha' : a = b
  · subst ha'
    have hb0 : b ≤ ⊥ := by
      have : b ≤ sSup (I \ {b}) := by
        have hsubset : (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {b} ≤ I \ {b} := by
          intro x hx
          rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxne⟩
          rcases hxU with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
          have huniq := R.carrier_span b hI'
          rcases huniq with ⟨Db, hDbR, hbEq, hbuniq⟩
          have : J = I := by
            have hbJ : b = sSup J := by
              simpa [sSup_eq_left.2 (Set.singleton_subset_iff.1 ?_)] using hbEq.symm
            have hbI : b = sSup I := by
              simpa [sSup_eq_left.2 (Set.singleton_subset_iff.1 ?_)] using hbEq.symm
            exact (hbuniq J hJ hbJ).trans (hbuniq I hI hbI).symm
          subst this
          exact ⟨hxJ, hxne⟩
        exact le_trans hb' (sSup_le_sSup hsubset)
      have hind := R.carrier_indep I hI
      have : Disjoint b (sSup (I \ {b})) := by
        simpa [sSupIndep, Set.mem_diff, and_left_comm, and_assoc, and_comm] using
          hind b hI' (sSup (I \ {b})) (by
            refine le_csSup ?_ ?_
            · intro x hx; exact le_csSup (by
                intro y hy; exact le_rfl) hx
            · exact ⟨b, ⟨hI', by simp⟩, le_rfl⟩) (by
            simp)
      exact (disjoint_iff.mp this).1 this
    exact hb0
  · exact bot_le_iff.1 (le_trans hb (by simpa [ha'] using hb0))

refine le_trans hb (le_trans ?_ (le_trans (sSup_le_sSup ?_) bot_le))
  · exact le_csSup (by
      refine (OrderBot.bddBelow ?_)
      exact ⟨⊥, by simp⟩) hI'
  · intro x hx
    have hxI : x ∈ I := by
      rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxa⟩
      rcases hxU with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
      have : I = J := by
        have hIuniq := R.carrier_indep I hI
        have hJuniq := R.carrier_indep J hJ
        have hxne : x ≠ ⊥ := by
          intro hx0
          have : ⊥ ∈ J := by simpa [hx0] using hxJ
          exact (R.bot_not_mem J hJ) this
        exact (hIuniq.eq_of_le_of_le hxne (by simpa using hxJ) (by simpa using hI'))
          (hJuniq.eq_of_le_of_le hxne (by simpa using hI') (by simpa using hxJ)) |>.symm
      simpa [this] using hxJ
    have : x ≤ ⊥ := (R.carrier_indep I hI) x hxI a hI' (by
      have : x ≠ a := by
        intro hxa'
        exact hxa (by simpa [hxa'])
      exact this)
    exact this

have ha' : a ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
    refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
    refine ⟨I, ?_⟩
    refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
    exact ⟨hI, hI'⟩
  have hsep : Disjoint {a} ((decomposition_of_refinement R) \ {a}) := by
    simpa [Set.disjoint_left, Set.mem_singleton_iff] using Set.singleton_disjoint.2
      (Set.disjoint_sdiff_left)
  have habot : a ⊓ sSup ((decomposition_of_refinement R) \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
    have : Disjoint a (sSup ((decomposition_of_refinement R) \ {a})) :=
      (R.carrier_indep I hI) a hI' (sSup ((decomposition_of_refinement R) \ {a}))
        (by
          refine le_trans ?_ (le_sSup ?_)
          · exact le_rfl
          · exact Set.mem_diff_of_mem ha' (by simp))
        (by
          refine le_trans le_rfl (le_sSup ?_)
          exact Set.mem_diff_of_mem ha' (by simp))
        (by
          intro x hx y hy hxy
          have hx' : x = a := by simpa using hx
          have hy' : y ∈ (decomposition_of_refinement R \ {a}) := by
            exact hy
          subst hx'
          exact (Set.not_mem_of_mem_diff hy') (by simp))
    simpa [disjoint_iff] using this
  have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup ((decomposition_of_refinement R) \ {a}) :=
    le_inf hb hb'
  simpa [habot] using le_trans this (by simp)

have hsupI : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hb0 : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' (sSup_le_sSup ?_)
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxa⟩
    rcases hxU with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
    have : J = I := (R.carrier_span a (by
        have : a ∈ ⋃ D ∈ R, D := by
          refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
          exact ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hI, hI'⟩⟩
        exact this) ).1 ?_ ?_
    · refine ⟨I, hI, ?_⟩
      simpa using (sSup_eq_of_mem (by simpa using hI'))
    · refine ⟨J, hJ, ?_⟩
      simpa using (sSup_eq_of_mem (by simpa using hxJ))
    subst this
    exact hx
  have : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    have hdis : Disjoint a (sSup (I \ {a})) := by
      refine (hsupI.disjoint_sSup ?_) 
      · exact hI'
      · intro x hx
        exact (Set.mem_diff.1 hx).2
    exact (hdis.le_bot_iff.mp (le_trans hb hb0))
  simpa using this

have hIa : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    have : sSup (I \ {a}) ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
      refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
      intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨hxI, hxa⟩
      refine ⟨?_, hxa⟩
      refine Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 ⟨hI, hxI⟩⟩
    exact le_trans hb' this
  have : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    have := hIa le_rfl hbI
    simpa [disjoint_left] using this (by simpa using hb) hI'
  exact this

have ha' : a ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
    refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
    exact ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hI, hI'⟩⟩
  have hsup : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' ?_
    refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxa⟩
    rcases hxU with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
    have hJa : a ∈ J := by
      have ha_eq : a = sSup J := by
        rcases R.carrier_span a ha' with ⟨J₁, hJ₁, haJ₁, huniq⟩
        have : J₁ = I := huniq I hI hI'
        simpa [this] using haJ₁
      have hx_le : x ≤ sSup J := le_trans (le_sSup hxJ) (le_rfl)
      have ha_le : a ≤ sSup J := by simpa [ha_eq] using le_rfl
      have hss : sSupIndep J := R.carrier_indep J hJ
      have : a = ⊥ := hss.eq_bot_of_le_of_le_diff haJ₁ (le_rfl) (by
        simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using ha_le) (by
        simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using hx_le) (by
        intro hax
        exact hxa (by
          have : x = a := le_antisymm (le_trans (le_sSup hxJ) ha_le) (le_trans (le_sSup hI') (by simpa [ha_eq] using le_rfl))
          simpa [this] ))
      simpa [this] using (R.bot_not_mem J hJ) (by
        simpa [this] using haJ₁)
    have huniq := R.carrier_span a ha'
    rcases huniq with ⟨J₁, hJ₁, haJ₁, huniq⟩
    have hIeq : I = J₁ := by
      symm
      exact huniq I hI hI' 
    have hJeq : J = J₁ := huniq J hJ hJa
    subst hIeq
    subst hJeq
    exact ⟨hxJ, hxa⟩
  have : b = ⊥ := hsup.eq_bot_of_le_of_le_diff hI' hb (le_rfl) hbI
  simpa [this]

have ha' : a ∉ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} := by
    intro ha'
    have : a ∈ ({a} : Set α) := by simpa
    exact ha'.2 this
  have : a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
    classical
    have hIind : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
    have hbmem : sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) ∈ I ⊔ (⊥ : Set α) := by
      simp
    have : Disjoint a (sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})) := by
      refine disjoint_iff.2 ?_
      intro x hx1 hx2
      have hx0 : x ≤ ⊥ := by
        exact bot_le
      simpa using le_trans hx0 bot_le
    simpa [disjoint_iff] using this.eq_bot
  have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
    exact le_inf hb hb'
  exact le_trans this (by simpa [this])

have hIindep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    have : I \ {a} ⊆ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} := by
      intro x hx
      refine ⟨?_, hx.2⟩
      exact ⟨I, ⟨hI, hx.1⟩⟩
    exact le_trans hb' (sSup_le_sSup this)
  have hbI' : b ≤ a := hb
  have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_inf hbI' hbI
  have hdisj : a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
    simpa [iSup_eq_sSup] using (hIindep disjoint_left).eq_bot
      (by
        refine le_trans (le_rfl) ?_
        exact le_csSup (by
          classical
          rcases Set.eq_empty_or_nonempty (I \ {a}) with h | h
          · simp [h]
          · exact h)
          (by
            classical
            by_contra ha'
            have : a ∈ I \ {a} := by
              refine ⟨hI', ?_⟩
              simpa using ha'
            exact this.2 rfl))
  simpa [hdisj] using le_trans this (le_of_eq hdisj)

have hInd : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have haI : a ∈ I := hI'
  have hbI : b ∈ I := by
    have : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
      refine le_trans hb' ?_
      refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
      intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
      rcases hxJ with ⟨hxJ, hxne⟩
      have : x ∈ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} := by
        refine ⟨?_, hxne⟩
        refine Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨J, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hJ, hxJ⟩⟩
      exact this
    have hb'': b ≠ a := by
      intro hba
      subst hba
      have : a ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := hb'
      have : a ≤ ⊥ := by
        refine le_trans this ?_
        exact sSup_le fun x hx => (Set.not_mem_of_mem_diff hx).elim rfl
      exact bot_lt_iff_ne_bot.mp (lt_of_le_of_ne (bot_le) (by simpa using (ne_of_gt (lt_of_le_of_ne (bot_le) (by
        intro h; simpa [h] using this)))) ) rfl
    have : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
      refine le_trans hb ?_
      exact le_csSup ?_ haI
    · exact ⟨b, by
        refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
        · exact hbI
        · exact by simpa using hb''⟩
    · intro x hx
      exact ⟨x, hx, le_rfl⟩
  have : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    have : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
      refine le_trans hb' ?_
      refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
      intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
      rcases hxJ with ⟨hxJ, hxne⟩
      have : x ∈ I \ {a} := by
        refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
        · have : x ∈ I := by
            by_contra hxI
            have : x ∈ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} := ⟨Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨J, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hJ, hxJ⟩⟩, hxne⟩
            exact hxI (by
              rcases this.1 with ⟨J', hJ', hxJ'⟩
              rcases hxJ' with ⟨hJ'R, hxJ'J⟩
              have : J' = I := by
                have := R.carrier_span a (by
                  have : a ∈ ⋃ D ∈ R, D := Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hI, haI⟩⟩
                  exact this)
                rcases this with ⟨D', hD'R, haeq, uniq⟩
                have haeqI : a = sSup I := by
                  have := R.carrier_span a (by
                    have : a ∈ ⋃ D ∈ R, D := Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hI, haI⟩⟩
                    exact this)
                  rcases this with ⟨D'', hD''R, haeq'', uniq''⟩
                  have : D'' = I := by
                    apply (uniq'' I hI).1
                    exact haeqI
                  subst this
                  exact haeq''
                have haeqJ' : a = sSup J' := by
                  have := R.carrier_span a (by
                    have : a ∈ ⋃ D ∈ R, D := Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨J', Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hJ', hxJ'J⟩⟩
                    exact this)
                  rcases this with ⟨D'', hD''R, haeq'', uniq''⟩
                  have : D'' = J' := by
                    apply (uniq'' J' hJ').1
                    exact rfl
                  subst this
                  exact haeq''
                exact (R.carrier_span a (by
                  have : a ∈ ⋃ D ∈ R, D := Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hI, haI⟩⟩
                  exact this)).2.2 J' hJ' haeqJ'
              subst this
              exact hxJ'J))
        · exact hxne
      exact this
    have := hInd a haI b hbI (by
      intro hba; subst hba
      have : b ∉ I \ {b} := by
        intro hbmem
        exact hbmem.2 rfl
      exact this (by
        refine ?_))
    exact bot_le
  simpa using this

have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    have hsub : I \ {a} ⊆ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} := by
      intro x hx
      refine ⟨?_, hx.2⟩
      refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
      exact ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hI, hx.1⟩⟩
    exact le_trans hb' (sSup_le_sSup hsub)
  have haI : a ≤ sSup I := le_sSup (show a ∈ I from hI')
  have hsup : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_inf hb hbI
  have hdisj : a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
    have hind : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
    have ha' : a ∈ I := hI'
    have hb'' : sSup (I \ {a}) ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_rfl
    simpa [sSup_eq_sSup_diff_singleton ha'] using hind ha' hb''
  simpa [hdisj] using le_trans hsup (le_of_eq hdisj)

have hb'' : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' ?_
    refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxna⟩
    rcases hxU with ⟨J, hJR, hxJ⟩
    have : J = I := by
      by_contra hne
      have hxbot : x ≤ ⊥ := by
        have hInd := R.carrier_indep J hJR
        have hInd' := R.carrier_indep I hI
        have hDisj : Disjoint (sSup J) (sSup I) := by
          classical
          have hbig : sSupIndep (decomposition_of_refinement R) := by
            classical
            exact forall_indep R
          have hxJmem : x ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
            refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
            refine ⟨J, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_⟩
            exact ⟨hJR, hxJ⟩
          have haImem : a ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
            refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
            refine ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_⟩
            exact ⟨hI, hI'⟩
          have := hbig a haImem x hxJmem (by
            intro hax
            exact hne (by
              have : I = J := by
                have := congrArg (fun t => a ∈ t) (by exact rfl)
                exact rfl
              exact this))
          exact this
        have hxle : x ≤ sSup J := le_trans (le_sSup (by simpa using hxJ)) le_rfl
        have hale : a ≤ sSup I := le_trans (le_sSup (by simpa using hI')) le_rfl
        have : x ⊓ a ≤ ⊥ := by
          have := hDisj.eq_bot
          simpa [disjoint_iff, inf_assoc, inf_left_comm, inf_comm] using congrArg (fun t => x ⊓ a ⊓ t) this
        have : x ≤ ⊥ := le_trans (inf_le_left) (by simpa using this)
        exact this
      exact False.elim (by simpa using (lt_of_le_of_ne (bot_le) (by
        intro h
        have := R.bot_not_mem J hJR
        exact this (by simpa [h] using hxJ))))
    simp [this, hxU, hxna]
  have hIndI := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    have : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := hb''
    have hbdisj : Disjoint b a := by
      refine disjoint_iff.2 ?_
      intro x hx
      have : x ≤ b := hx.1
      have : x ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_trans this hb''
      have : x ≤ ⊥ := by
        have := hIndI a (by
          have : a ∈ I := hI'
          exact Or.inl (by simpa using this)) x (by
          have : x ∈ I \ {a} := by
            refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
            · sorry
            · sorry
          exact Or.inr this) (by
          intro hxa
          have : x = a := le_antisymm (le_trans (le_trans (le_sSup (by
            have : a ∈ I := hI'
            simpa using this)) le_rfl) (le_sSup (by
              have : x ∈ I \ {a} := by
                refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                · sorry
                · sorry
              simpa using this)) le_rfl) (le_trans (le_sSup (by
            have : x ∈ I \ {a} := by
              refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
              · sorry
              · sorry
            simpa using this)) le_rfl)
          exact False.elim (by
            have : x ∈ ({a} : Set α) := by simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using this
            exact (by
              have : x ∉ ({a} : Set α) := by
                have : x ∈ I \ {a} := by
                  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                  · sorry
                  · sorry
                exact this.2
              exact this this)))
        exact this
      exact this
    have : b ⊓ a = ⊥ := hbdisj.eq_bot
    have : b ≤ ⊥ := by
      simpa [le_bot_iff] using le_trans (le_inf hb le_rfl) (by simpa [this] using (le_of_eq rfl))
    exact this
  exact this

have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    have hsubset : sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
      refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
      intro x hx
      rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxne⟩
      rcases hxU with ⟨x, hxmem, rfl⟩
      rcases hxmem with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
      refine ⟨?_, hxne⟩
      refine ⟨x, ?_, hxJ⟩
      exact ⟨I, hI, hxJ⟩
    exact le_trans hb' hsubset
  have ha_not_mem : a ∉ (I \ {a}) := by
    intro ha'
    exact ha'.2 (by rfl)
  have h_indep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    have hb0 : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
      exact le_inf hb hbI
    have hdisj : a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
      simpa [Set.diff_singleton_eq_erase, Set.erase_eq, Set.mem_singleton_iff] using
        (h_indep a hI' (sSup (I \ {a})) (by
          refine le_csSup ?_ ?_
          ·
            rcases (R.bot_not_mem I hI) with hbot
            have : (⊥ : α) ∉ (I \ {a}) := by
              intro h
              exact hbot h.1
            exact Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mp ⟨a, ⟨hI', by simp⟩⟩
          ·
            exact hbI) (by
          intro h
          exact ha_not_mem (by
            have : a ∈ (I \ {a}) := by
              refine ⟨hI', ?_⟩
              intro h'
              exact h (by simpa [h'] )
            exact this)))
    exact le_trans hb0 (by simpa [hdisj])
  exact this

have ha' : a ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
    refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
    refine ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_⟩
    exact ⟨hI, hI'⟩
  have hb'' : b ≤ sSup ((decomposition_of_refinement R) \ {a}) := by
    simpa [decomposition_of_refinement] using hb'
  have := (R.carrier_indep I hI) a hI' b ?_ hb
  · exact this hb''
  · have : b ∈ I := by
      by_contra hbI
      have : b ∈ I \ {a} := by
        refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
        · simpa using hbI
        · intro hba
          have : a = b := le_antisymm (by simpa [hba] using hb) (by simpa [hba] using le_rfl)
          exact hbI (this.symm ▸ hI')
      have : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_sSup this
      have : sSup (I \ {a}) ≤ sSup ((decomposition_of_refinement R) \ {a}) := by
        refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
        intro x hx
        refine ⟨?_, hx.2⟩
        have hxI : x ∈ I := hx.1
        refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
        refine ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_⟩
        exact ⟨hI, hxI⟩
      exact hb'' (le_trans this this)
    exact this

have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    have hle : sSup (I \ {a}) ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
      exact sSup_le_sSup (by
        intro x hx
        have hxI : x ∈ I := hx.1
        have hxa : x ∉ ({a} : Set α) := hx.2
        refine ⟨?_, hxa⟩
        refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hI, hxI⟩⟩)
    exact le_trans hb' hle
  have hbot : sSup (I \ {a}) ⊓ a = ⊥ := by
    have hIind : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
    have ha' : a ∈ I := hI'
    have hdisj : Disjoint (sSup (I \ {a})) a := by
      simpa [sSupIndep, ha'] using hIind a ha' (sSup (I \ {a})) (by
        refine le_trans (le_sSup ?_) (le_rfl)
        exact Set.mem_diff.2 ⟨ha', by simp⟩) (by
        intro x hx
        exact hx.2)
    simpa [disjoint_iff] using hdisj
  have : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) ⊓ a := le_inf hbI hb
  simpa [hbot] using le_trans this (le_of_eq hbot)

have ha' : a ∈ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) := by
    refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
    exact ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨hI, hI'⟩⟩
  have habot : a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
    by_contra hne
    have hle : a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) :=
      inf_le_right
    have hmemsup : a ∈ ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
      have : a ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
        exact le_trans (le_inf_iff.mp (le_of_not_ge (by
          intro h
          exact hne (bot_eq_inf_bot_of_le_of_le (le_rfl) h))).1) le_rfl
      refine Set.mem_diff.2 ?_
      refine ⟨?_, by simpa⟩
      exact le_trans (le_trans (le_rfl) this) (le_of_eq rfl) |> (fun h => ?_)
    exact (Set.not_mem_diff_singleton _ _).elim hmemsup
  have hb0 : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
    exact le_inf hb hb'
  exact le_trans hb0 (le_of_eq habot)

have hIa : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' ?_
    refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxa⟩
    rcases hxU with ⟨J, hJR, hxJ⟩
    by_cases hJ : J = I
    · subst hJ
      exact ⟨hxJ, hxa⟩
    · have : x = ⊥ := by
        apply hIa.eq_bot_of_le_of_le (a := a) (b := x)
        · exact hI'
        · exact hxJ
        · exact hJ
        · exact le_rfl
        · exact le_rfl
      subst this
      exfalso
      exact (R.bot_not_mem J hJR) hxJ
  have habot : a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ :=
    hIa.inf_iSup_eq_bot (a := a) (s := I \ {a}) hI' (by simp)
  have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_inf hb hbI
  simpa [habot] using this

have hb'' : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' ?_
    refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxna⟩
    rcases hxU with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
    have : J = I := by
      have huniq : ∃! D ∈ R, a = sSup D := R.carrier_span a ?_ 
      · rcases huniq with ⟨D0, hD0R, hD0eq, hD0uniq⟩
        have haI : a = sSup I := by
          have hspan := R.carrier_span a ?_
          · rcases hspan with ⟨D1, hD1R, hD1eq, hD1uniq⟩
            have : D1 = I := by
              apply hD1uniq I hI
              simpa using haI
            simpa [this] using hD1eq
          · exact by
              have := show a ∈ I from hI'
              exact False.elim (by
                have : a ∈ S := by
                  classical
                  by_contra h
                  exact h (by
                    -- dummy, unreachable in this sketch
                    exact h)
                exact (by cases h))
        have haJ : a = sSup J := by
          classical
          by_contra h
          exact h (by
            -- dummy, unreachable in this sketch
            exact haI)
        exact False.elim (by
          classical
          -- dummy, unreachable in this sketch
          exact False.elim (by trivial))
    subst this
    exact ⟨hxJ, hxna⟩
  have hind : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbzero : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    have : Disjoint a (sSup (I \ {a})) := by
      simpa [sSupIndep_iff_disjoint_left] using (hind.disjoint_sSup (by
        simpa using hI'))
    have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_inf hb hb''
    have : b ≤ ⊥ := by
      simpa [disjoint_iff] using le_trans this (by
        simpa [disjoint_iff] using this)
    exact this
  exact hbzero

have hInd : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' ?_
    refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxna⟩
    rcases hxU with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
    have hEq : J = I := by
      have hx' : x ∈ S := by
        have hxS : x ∈ S := (R.carrier_span x hx').choose_spec.1
        exact hxS
      have haS : a ∈ S := by
        have haS : a ∈ S := (R.carrier_span a ?_).choose_spec.1
        exact haS
      classical
      have hU1 := (R.carrier_span a haS).choose_spec.2
      have hU2 := (R.carrier_span a haS).choose_spec.2
      exact rfl
    subst hEq
    exact ⟨hxJ, hxna⟩
  have : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    have hb'': b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_inf hb hbI
    have hdis : a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
      simpa [hInd.disjoint_sSup, hI', Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    simpa [hdis] using hb''
  exact this

have ha' : a ∉ ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
    simp
  have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := le_inf hb hb'
  have : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    refine this.trans ?_
    simpa [ha'] using (inf_sSup_eq_bot_iff.2 ha')
  simpa using this

have hb'a : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' ?_
    refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hxU, hxa⟩
    rcases hxU with ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
    have : J = I := by
      have hspanJ := (R.carrier_span a (by
        -- obtain `a ∈ S` from `a ∈ ⋃ D ∈ R, D` is not available; use classical choice:
        -- this lemma is only used under `a ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R`, so we can
        -- pick the witnessing `I` already; thus force uniqueness by reflexivity
        -- (the uniqueness premise is not needed here).
        -- We use `by classical exact False.elim` is not allowed; instead avoid `carrier_span`.
        -- So we don't need `J = I`; just show `x ∈ I` using `sSupIndep` below without it.
        )).1
      -- dummy: never reached
      rfl
    simpa [this] using hxJ
  have hind : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have hbI : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := hb'a
  have hb0 : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    -- use independence of `I`: since `b ≤ a` and `b ≤ sSup (I \ {a})`
    -- we get `b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥`
    have : a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
      have haI : a ∈ I := hI'
      have hna : a ∉ (I \ {a}) := by
        intro h
        exact h.2 (by simp)
      simpa [hind.disjoint_iff, haI, hna] using (hind a haI (I \ {a}) (by
        intro x hx
        exact hx.1) (by
        intro h
        exact hna h))
    have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_inf hb hbI
    simpa [this] using le_trans this (by simpa [this] using le_rfl)
  exact hb0

have hInd : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have haI : a ∈ I := hI'
  have hbI : b ∈ I := by
    have hbdecomp : b ∈ decomposition_of_refinement R := by
      refine ⟨I, ?_, ?_⟩
      · exact ⟨hI, rfl⟩
      · exact hb
    exact hbdecomp
  have hb'I : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    refine le_trans hb' ?_
    refine sSup_le_sSup ?_
    intro x hx
    rcases hx with ⟨hxI, hxne⟩
    refine Set.mem_diff.mpr ?_
    constructor
    · refine Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ?_⟩
      refine ⟨?_, hxI⟩
      exact ⟨hI, rfl⟩
    · intro hxa
      exact hxne hxa
  exact hInd.eq_bot_of_le_sSup_diff_singleton haI hbI hb'I

have hnot : a ∉ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} := by
    simp
  have : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
    exact le_inf hb hb'
  have : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    have hsub : I \ {a} ⊆ (⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a} := by
      intro x hx
      refine ⟨?_, hx.2⟩
      refine Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_
      refine ⟨I, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ?_⟩
      exact ⟨hI, hx.1⟩
    have : sSup (I \ {a}) ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
      exact sSup_le_sSup hsub
    exact le_trans (le_inf_left.trans this) (le_inf_right)
  have ha_disj : a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
    have hInd : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
    have ha' : a ∈ I := hI'
    have : Disjoint a (sSup (I \ {a})) := by
      exact hInd.disjoint_sSup (by simpa using ha') (by
        intro x hx
        exact (Set.mem_diff.1 hx).2)
    simpa [disjoint_iff] using this
  exact le_trans (le_inf hb (le_trans this (le_of_eq ha_disj))) le_rfl
